en: Gentlemen, what are the four pillars?
ko: 신사 여러분, 네 가지 기둥은 무엇인가요?

en: Okay, study group. Meeks, ace Latin. I didn't quite flunk English.
So, if you want, we got our study group.
ko: 그러니까, 원한다면 스터디 그룹이 있어. 물론, 카메론이 나에게 부탁했어.

en: Sure, Cameron asked me to. Anyone mind including?
What's his specialty, boot licking? Um, he's your roommate.
That's not my fault. Uh, I'm sorry. My name is Steven Meeks.
Oh, this is Todd Anderson. Nice to meet you.
Todd's brother was Jeffrey Anderson. Oh, yeah, sure.
It's every bit as tough as they say, unless you're a genius like Meeks.
ko: 정말로 힘든 곳이에요, 그들이 말하는 것처럼,

en: He flatters me. That's why I help him with Latin.
ko: 그래서 내가 그를 라틴어로 도와주는 거죠.
